inbox.title: Pending payments
inbox.pro_only_hint: Upgrade your plan to review and approve payment receipts submitted by clients.

reject.reason_min: Reason must be at least 10 characters long.

dialogs.approve_description: Do you want to approve this payment?
dialogs.approve_description_with_client: Do you want to approve the payment of {{amount}} from {{client}}? It will be automatically registered as an event payment.
dialogs.reject_description: Provide a rejection reason. The client will see it in their history.
